pages.text:
SwiftTrack Global Logistics BILL OF LADING
Original, Not Negotiable
BOL NUMBER
STG-7729-04-AX
PO / REFERENCE NUMBER
PO-2026-HRG-04
PICKUP DATE
2026-12-04
PRO NUMBER
992-001-X88
SHIPPER (FROM)
Titan Manufacturing Co.
990 Industrial Loop
Detroit, MI, 48201
Phone: (313) 555-0192
CONSIGNEE (TO)
West Coast Distribution Hub
4000 Pier 9 Way
Long Beach, CA, 90802
Phone: (562) 555-0440
CARRIER
SwiftTrack Global Logistics
DECLARED VALUE
$4600.63
SHIPMENT DETAILS
Qty Pkg Type Description Weight (lbs) Freight Class NMFC Code Dims (L×W×H in)
12 Pallets Steel Fasteners, Grade 8 3800 50 95120 48×40×44
2 Pallets Machine Parts, Iron/Steel (Fixed) 1050 70 114820 48×40×36
SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS / HANDLING NOTES
DANGER: Do not stack pallets. Temperature sensitive - keep dry. 
Call 24 hours prior to delivery at (562) 555-0440. 
Driver must verify seal #192837 upon arrival. Liftgate required at destination.
TOTAL WEIGHT
4,850 lbs
RECEIVED, subject to individually determined rates or contracts that have been agreed upon in writing between the carrier and shipper, if applicable; otherwise, to all applicable rates, classifications, and rules 
that have been established; goods described herein in apparent good order, except as noted (contents and condition of packages unknown), marked, consigned, and destined as indicated, which said carrier (the 
word carrier being understood throughout this contract as meaning any person or corporation in possession of the property under the contract) agrees to carry to its usual place of delivery at said destination, if on 
its route, otherwise to deliver to another carrier on the route to said destination.
SIGNATURES
SHIPPER SIGNATURE
Signature confirms freight description is accurate
Date: _______________
CARRIER SIGNATURE
Signature confirms receipt of freight as described
Date: _______________
CONSIGNEE SIGNATURE
Note any damage before signing
Date: _______________
Powered by Warp's free BOL generator · wearewarp.com/tools/bill-of-lading-template This BOL is not negotiable unless marked as such Page 1 of 1
